entries.description: Authored docs/session-sets/044-ai-chat-log-discovery-and-experiments/harvest-objectives-and-redaction.md Part 1: locked the harvest-objectives matrix as 15 numbered rows across four groupings (A1-A5 identity, B1-B5 action, C1-C5 boundary, plus a D §D summary stating the minimum-viable conflict-detection triple as timestamp + engine+provider + set/session id). Each row carries an S1-hypothesis verdict on whether the signal is native, narration-required, or implicit. Out-of-scope carve-outs listed (token counts, latency, cost-per-turn already in router metrics; embedding vectors; model-internal state; prompt content per the redaction policy). Refinement window: S2 may add Claude-specific objectives; new objectives past S2 require a spec addendum.

Authored Part 2 of harvest-objectives-and-redaction.md: two-tier storage (scratch outside repo at C:\tmp\dabbler-log-harvest\, synthesis layer inside repo). Locked the synthetic-test-material rule (all harvest runs operate against a synthetic session set at C:\tmp\dabbler-log-harvest\synthetic-set\, not real Dabbler work). Locked 7 scrub rules covering verbatim user prompts (paraphrase), verbatim assistant turns (paraphrase except synthetic-set test prompts), file contents read by the assistant (elide), bearer tokens / API keys (elide), operator-local paths (substitute ~ for C:\Users\denmi\), non-public repo names (placeholder), and personally-identifying third-party content. Reading-side discipline: prefer wc / head -c / jq keys / sqlite .schema operations that surface structure without dumping content; never `cat` an entire log file. Auditability: every harvested file referenced in a discovery note must list scratch-path origin + byte count at harvest time + one-line schema description. Bundled: .gitignore extended to exclude dabbler-log-harvest/ at the repo root as belt-and-suspenders against accidental symlink relocation.

Authored discovery-notes-copilot.md §1 (artifact inventory matrix), §2 (full session-store.db schema with DDL captured verbatim from sqlite_master.sql, column names only — no row values), §3 (OTel JSONL exporter contract per `copilot help monitoring`), §5 (authentication-bridge security note flagging ~/.copilot/ide/*.lock token presence). Per Part 3 methodology of the policy doc: each artifact row populates 8 columns (Artifact / Format / Trigger / Per-process? / Schema / Surfaces signals / Redaction risk / Sample size at probe). 9 artifact rows covering config.json (JSONC), logs/process-*.log (plain text ISO-timestamped, 26 lines on the operator's instance), session-state/<uuid>/{workspace.yaml, checkpoints/index.md, files/, research/}, session-store.db (118784 bytes, 0 rows in all data tables — schema-derived findings only), ide/*.lock (CRITICAL redaction risk: plaintext headers.Authorization), OTel JSONL export, and --output-format json stdout. session_files(session_id, file_path, tool_name, turn_index, first_seen_at) identified as the harvest-objective B1+B2+B3 in storage form: 'which tool touched which file on which turn' is already first-class in Copilot's session store, no opt-in required.

DEFERRED to S2 per operator decision 2026-05-22 ('Structural now + scaffold live runs for S2'). S1 does not drive new Copilot turns. Scaffolding shipped to make S2 turnkey: scratch tree created at C:\tmp\dabbler-log-harvest\ with subdirs for synthetic-set, otel, and s1-s4 per-experiment outputs; setup-copilot-env.ps1 written to dot-source before `copilot` invocations (sets COPILOT_HOME to the isolated harvest dir, COPILOT_OTEL_FILE_EXPORTER_PATH to otel/copilot-baseline.jsonl, leaves OTEL_INSTRUMENTATION_GENAI_CAPTURE_MESSAGE_CONTENT unset/off per Part 2 of the redaction policy); scratch README documents the layout + non-copy rules; discovery-notes-copilot.md §6 includes the S2 harvest-harness recipe (synthetic-set seed content authored at run time, three representative invocations covering interactive / prompt-mode --output-format json / prompt-mode with a tool call). Per-objective coverage matrix in §4 derived from documented contracts + schema inspection: 13 of 15 objectives surfaced natively or via OTel opt-in (9 unambiguous Yes, 2 Implicit, 1 Probably yes pending S2 confirmation, 1 derivative); only A3 (effort) and C3 (set/session boundary marker) unambiguously require narration.

Round A verification via ai_router.query (gemini-pro / gemini-2.5-pro tier 2). Bundle: 33061 chars across 4 parts (S1 spec excerpt, harvest-objectives-and-redaction.md full, discovery-notes-copilot.md full, .gitignore addition excerpt). First call: REJECTED with one must-fix — §4 coverage summary numerically inconsistent (claimed '9 of 13' but table had 15 rows, of which 13 were positive verdicts, and a list of 12 followed the sentence). Cost: $0.01876 (12295 in / 339 out). Fix applied in-line: rewrote the coverage-summary paragraph to state '13 of 15 objectives are surfaced ... 9 unambiguous Yes, 2 Implicit, 1 Probably yes, 1 derivative; only A3 + C3 require narration'. Round A re-run: VERIFIED, no must-fix issues. Two non-blocking notes: (a) verifier endorsed the now-corrected coverage summary as internally consistent; (b) verifier endorsed the §4 'firmer ground than the spec assumed' conclusion as defensible-from-schemas-and-documented-contracts even without live-run data. Re-run cost: $0.01768 (12436 in / 213 out). Cumulative routed Set 044 spend after S1: $0.03644 of $15.00 NTE (S5 budget allocation). Verification artifact at docs/session-sets/044-.../verification-output/round-a-session-1-result.json.

Authored discovery-notes-claude.md §1 (artifact inventory matrix, 16 rows) + §2 (JSONL transcript schema: 7 distinct `type` values enumerated from a 713-line representative sample; 9 distinct `toolUseResult` shapes mapped to tools — Edit/Write/Bash/Bash-older/Grep/LS/AskUserQuestion/TodoWrite/Read; `assistant.message.content` block types text/thinking/tool_use enumerated; file-history-snapshot blob-index structure characterized) + §3 (Dabbler SessionStart hook integration characterized from installOrchestratorHookClaudeCode.ts + claude-session-start-invoker.js shim source — hook is opt-in via wizard; this repo's local + global Claude settings have no hooks block, confirming the S2 start_session call came from the orchestrator's explicit shell invocation, not a hook firing) + §5 (auth-bridge note: ~/.claude/ide/*.lock authToken is direct parallel to Copilot's headers.Authorization; symmetric critical-redaction concern). Reading-side discipline strictly applied: distinct-key-set enumeration / byte counts / enum-cardinality probes only against the operator's REAL Claude state (~/.claude/ with 31 project slugs and 121 transcript artifacts for this repo alone) — no transcript content read into the conversation or quoted in any committed file.

DEFERRED to S3 per operator decision mid-session 2026-05-22 ('Defer live runs to S3'). Same pattern S1 set: the structural inventory in discovery-notes-claude.md §1-§8 is sufficient to author baseline-comparison.md and reach a §4 cross-backend coverage verdict without live runs. S3 will fold both the S1-deferred Copilot live-runs and the S2-deferred Claude live-runs into the narration-design session, where they naturally need a baseline against which to measure narration delta. Scaffolding for the future live runs added to discovery-notes-claude.md §6 (Claude-side harness recipe layered on top of S1's scratch tree at C:\tmp\dabbler-log-harvest\): isolated $CLAUDE_HOME, snapshot list (projects/<slug>/<conv-uuid>.jsonl + subagents/ + tool-results/ + sessions/<pid>.json + telemetry/), do-NOT-snapshot list (ide/, .credentials.json, file-history/). Open empirical questions list at §7 (9 questions including A3 per-turn-effort, --print JSONL parity with interactive, hook payload fields beyond cwd, session-env/ population trigger) inherited forward to S3.

Authored baseline-comparison.md (8 sections). §1 headline verdict: both backends already surface the (conv-id, file-path, tool-name, turn-index, timestamp, engine, provider) tuple a conflict watcher needs; narration design problem reduces to TWO signals (A3 + C3), not 5+. §2 side-by-side per-objective table: 9 symmetric rows, 6 divergent rows all in Claude's favor (A2 per-turn `message.model` vs Copilot OTel-opt-in / per-session row; A5 per-event `sessionId` vs Copilot per-session row; B1 inline tool args by default vs Copilot OTel content-capture opt-in; B4 confirmed in S2 own transcript vs Copilot TBD; B5 full diff inline vs Copilot tool_name+filepath only; C5 explicit linked event via `sourceToolAssistantUUID` vs Copilot OTel span tree). §3 enumerates 4 invariants + 5 divergences. §4 splits testable-today (4 conflict-detection queries native on both) from needs-narration (2). §5 narration-scope-for-S3 = C3 mandatory + A3 conditional. §6 risk/asymmetry summary feeding S5 proposal: Claude `file-history/` blob store has no Copilot equivalent → biases proposal toward read-in-place + project-to-summary, not copy-then-process; Claude has SessionStart hook surface for automatic narration, Copilot does not. §7 9 open empirical questions inherited from S1+S2 for S3 live runs.

Refined harvest-objectives-and-redaction.md Part 2 with three new scrub rules tagged 'Added 2026-05-22 in Set 044 S2': (8) ~/.claude/file-history/<conv-uuid>/ content-addressed blob store as copy-exclusion in parity with ide/ — mirrors every file Claude has edited in any conversation; (9) ~/.claude/plans/<title-slug>.md filename leakage — slugs paraphrase the prompting message (21 such files on operator's instance); (10) `type: "last-prompt"` JSONL events carry verbatim user prompts in the `lastPrompt` top-level field; harvester must filter the type or apply rule-1 discipline. Added a cross-backend copy-exclusion table listing 5 paths (Copilot+Claude IDE locks, Claude credentials, Claude file-history blob store, Copilot OAuth credential location TBD pending S3 empirical probe). Refinement window extended from 'closed after S2' to 'open through S4' to accommodate narration-emitted log surfaces from S3/S4. Identified narration gaps for S3 design scope: C3 (set/session boundary marker) mandatory and symmetric across backends; A3 (per-turn effort high/medium/low) conditional — see step 5.

Round A verification via ai_router.query (gemini-pro). Bundle: 84079 chars across 5 parts (S2 spec excerpt, harvest-objectives-and-redaction.md refined, discovery-notes-copilot.md from S1 for side-by-side context, discovery-notes-claude.md new, baseline-comparison.md new). First call: REJECTED with FOUR must-fix issues — (1) Copilot OAuth credential file missing from cross-backend copy-exclusion table; (2) redaction refinement window closed prematurely after S2 (narration markers in S3 may create new log surfaces needing policy refinement); (3) headline verdict oversimplifies — asymmetric availability of inline-vs-envelope signals (B1 args, B5 diff, C5 link shape) is a harvester-architecture problem separate from narration scope; (4) symmetry tally does not acknowledge methodological bias — S2 read populated Claude instance vs S1 read essentially empty Copilot instance, so some 'Claude stronger' divergences may be probe-fidelity asymmetry. Cost: $0.04069 (27746 in / 601 out). All four must-fixes applied in-line: (1) added Copilot OAuth placeholder row + S3 follow-up task; (2) reopened refinement window through S4 with rationale; (3) added 'narration design vs harvester design' distinction to baseline-comparison §1 + §5; (4) added methodology-caveat paragraph to baseline-comparison §2 noting populated-vs-empty instance asymmetry. Round A re-run: VERIFIED, no must-fix issues. One nice-to-have note: deeper structural probe of `assistant.message.usage` and `stop_details` key-sets could have resolved A3 uncertainty without live run. Applied post-verdict: empirically probed the 327-assistant-event sample — `usage` has 10 fields (cache_*/inference_geo/input_tokens/iterations/output_tokens/server_tool_use/service_tier/speed); `stop_details` never populates as a dict; NO reasoning_effort/thinking_tokens field. `service_tier`+`speed` (both 'standard' in sample) carry the /fast-vs-standard axis; high/medium/low effort axis confirmed absent. Updated A3 row in both discovery-notes-claude.md §4 and baseline-comparison.md §2; updated §7 Q1 to 'RESOLVED structurally'. Re-run cost: $0.03907 (28753 in / 313 out). Cumulative routed Set 044 spend after S2: $0.11620 of $15.00 NTE (S5 budget). Verification artifact at docs/session-sets/044-.../verification-output/round-a-session-2-result.json.
